title: Lucid Enchants [Enchantment Description]
description: Layered enchantment tooltips for vanilla and modded Minecraft.  Compact, readable, expandable  with scrolling, enchanting table  support, and modpack friendly description lookup.
body:
**✨ Lucid Enchants**

Layered Enchantment Tooltips for Vanilla, JEI & Modded Minecraft
Clean by default. Deep when you need it.

**🧠 What is Lucid Enchants?**

Vanilla enchantment tooltips are… let's be honest… not very helpful.
You get a name. Maybe a number. And then you're expected to just know what it does.

Lucid Enchants fixes that beautifully.

Lucid Enchants introduces a layered tooltip system that gives you:

Quick scanning when you're in a rush
Clear explanations when you're curious
Deep technical data when you're min-maxing

No clutter. No confusion. Just lucid enchantments.

**🔎 Four Tooltip Layers**

Lucid Enchants gives you 4 powerful information layers:

Layer	Trigger	What You See
Compact	Default	Clean, minimal, fast scanning
Short	Shift	Clear effect summaries
Expanded	Ctrl	Compatibility, conflicts, acquisition
Advanced	Shift + Ctrl	Formulas, technical data, metadata

Each layer is fully configurable show exactly what you want, nothing more.

**🎯 Features**
🧩 Layered Tooltip System
4 intelligent tooltip layers
Modifier key based expansion
Fully customizable content per layer
Clean UI that stays readable
📘 Works with JEI & Custom Enchantment Mods

Lucid Enchants automatically enhances tooltips everywhere, including:

JEI (Just Enough Items)
Custom enchantment mods
Modded items with enchantments
Enchant books & enchanted gear

No compatibility patches needed  it just works.

**✨ Enchanting Table Support**

Lucid Enchants also improves Enchanting Table offers:

Shows custom descriptions directly in offers
Long tooltips automatically scroll
Lapis & Level cost stays pinned (no more losing them!)
**🖱️ Scrollable Tooltips**

No more tooltips that go off your screen:

Mouse wheel scrolling
Smooth scrolling
Integrated scrollbar
Smart height limits
**🔧 Modded Enchantment Support**

Lucid Enchants works with vanilla AND modded enchantments:

Registry-based detection
Language-key fallback system
No hardcoded mod integrations needed
Works with custom enchantment systems

**Already tested with:**

Enchantments Encore
Elemental Enchantments
SuperEnchants
Custom modded enchantments
JEI enchantment displays
📦 Modpack Friendly

Perfect for modpack creators:

Resource pack support
Lang-key overrides
Add descriptions without touching Java
Fully customizable descriptions
⚙️ Polished Configuration

Full configuration via YACL + Mod Menu:

Layer profiles
Color customization
Spacing controls
Tooltip styling
Scroll settings
Source priority

Quick presets included:

Balanced
Minimal
Technical
⚡ Performance Friendly

Built with performance in mind:

Tooltip caching
Cache prewarming
Resource reload support
Lightweight & fast
✅ Compatibility

✔ Vanilla Enchantments
✔ Modded Enchantments
✔ JEI (Just Enough Items)
✔ Custom Enchantment Mods
✔ Large Modpacks
✔ Client-Side Only
✔ Resource Pack Friendly
✔ Fabric Compatible

No server required.

**📖 Supported Description Sources**

Lucid Enchants automatically reads descriptions from:

Built-in JSON dataset
enchantment.<namespace>.<path>.desc
enchantment.<namespace>.<path>.desc.full
enchantment_lore.<namespace>:<path>.description
Language fallback system for unknown enchants
**⚙️ Configuration Categories**
General
Layers
Keybinds
Display
Spacing
Layer Profiles
Colors
Scrolling
Sources
Modpack
Advanced
**💡 Why Lucid Enchants?**

Because enchantments shouldn't be mysterious.
Because modpacks deserve clarity.
Because tooltips should actually help.

**👤 Author**

Made by Xeonz

**✨ Lucid Enchants**

Make enchantments lucid.
